name: UXPin Design and Prototyping Platform API
what_it_does: Design and prototyping platform with REST API — enabling UX designers to create interactive prototypes with code-level realism via UXPin Merge (using real React/Angular/Vue components in designs), manage design systems and documentation, collaborate on wireframes, and export assets, with focus on bridging design-development gaps.
use_cases: Managing UXPin design projects and prototypes via REST API
Integrating UXPin Merge with React/Angular/Vue component libraries for code-accurate prototypes
Exporting design assets and specifications via UXPin API for developer handoff
Querying prototype comment and feedback data for stakeholder communication
Managing design system components and documentation via UXPin DSL
not_for: Simple low-fidelity wireframes (use Balsamiq for quick sketching)
Real-time team collaboration without code components (Figma's collaboration is stronger for non-code teams)
Mobile-native prototype testing (use Axure or Figma's prototype mode for mobile testing)
best_when: A design team closely collaborating with React/Angular/Vue developers needs prototypes built from real code components — ensuring pixel-perfect accuracy and realistic interactions without developer involvement in prototype building.
avoid_when: You don't use a component library, primarily design for mobile, need simple quick prototypes, or your team lacks the technical setup for UXPin Merge.

auth.notes: API token from UXPin account. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. No webhooks. UXPin Merge SDK for JavaScript component library integration (React, Angular, Vue). REST API for project and prototype management. No OAuth2. Merge configuration via uxpin.config.js. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: Polish company (Warsaw/San Francisco). Founded 2010. Raised $18M Series A (2019). Backed by Oxx, Blueyard. UXPin Merge is the key product differentiator — using real React/Angular/Vue components in prototypes. 40,000+ companies. Design System Editor for component documentation. Accessibility testing built into prototypes. Enterprise SAML SSO. GovDesign for US government customers. Merge requires paid plan.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for projects, prototypes, and user management. API token bearer auth. Moderate documentation. UXPin Merge SDK is JavaScript-based — separate from REST API. No webhooks — polling required. Merge configuration via config file in component repository. Free tier limited to 1 prototype.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Project reads fully idempotent. Prototype reads idempotent. Comment reads idempotent. Project creation not idempotent — check by name.
known_agent_gotchas: UXPin Merge requires $49/user/month plan — significantly more expensive than basic plans
Merge setup requires React/Angular/Vue component library with proper Storybook integration
No webhooks — must poll for project and comment updates
Polish company with EU data residency — verify data processing agreement for EU data
Free tier limited to 1 prototype — cannot evaluate for team use on free tier

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. API token auth. Polish company with GDPR-first design. Prototype data contains unreleased product designs — restrict sharing and API access. Merge SDK imports component code — code review required before Merge integration. SAML SSO available for enterprise identity management.
